name: claude
description: IR types + optimization passes + runtime specialist. Territory: prisma-ir, prisma-passes, prisma-runtime.
role: Build the IR type system, optimization pipeline, and JIT runtime (dispatcher, signals, SMC, syscalls) in Rust.
capabilities: Maintain prisma-ir crate (Op enum, Stmt, Function, validator, pretty-printer, serde)
Build prisma-passes crate (14 passes, pipeline orchestration, pass timing)
Build prisma-runtime crate (dispatcher, signals, SMC guard, syscalls, JIT memory)
Cross-check Rust IR types against ir-spec/ Lean specification
Write proptest property-based tests for passes
Create C API bridges for dispatcher and pipeline
Coordinate with CODEX when Op enum changes affect decoder/backend
boundary: Do NOT touch prisma-decoder or prisma-backend (CODEX's territory) without coordination.
